div.p: M1 → M2/M4: PeerList provides random peer selection for gossip rounds and SWIM probes M2 → M3: Push gossip disseminates updates; anti-entropy repairs gaps M3 → M1: Anti-entropy updates peer state via LWW resolution M4 → M1: SWIM transitions peers through ALIVE→SUSPECT→DEAD M4 → M2: Piggyback events attached to gossip messages M5 → All: Test harness orchestrates and validates
